# CWE-547: JWT signing secret hard-coded in source.
lang: go
file: CWE-547-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"time"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"github.com/golang-jwt/jwt/v5"
)

const jwtSecret = "super-secret-not-rotated"

func IssueSession(c *gin.Context) {
	token := jwt.NewWithClaims(jwt.SigningMethodHS256, jwt.MapClaims{
		"sub": c.GetString("uid"),
		"exp": time.Now().Add(time.Hour).Unix(),
	})
	signed, _ := token.SignedString([]byte(jwtSecret))
	c.String(200, signed)
}
